sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 7.37 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.7)

statement.latex: We say that a profinite group is strictly complete\/ if each of its subgroups of finite index is open. It is known (B.\,Hartley, Math.~Z., { 168}, no.\,1 (1979), 71--76) that finitely generated profinite groups having a finite series with pronilpotent factors are strictly complete. Is a profinite group strictly complete if it is \ \ finitely generated? \ finitely generated and prosoluble? { O.\,V....

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
